name: Dexus Industria Reit.
analysis: DXI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.4600, stop A$2.2869, target A$2.9793 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
